narrative.description: Dr. Robotnik has trapped animals inside robots and seeks the Chaos Emeralds. Sonic speeds through six zones of loop-filled stages, collecting rings, freeing animals, and racing to the signpost before confronting Robotnik in his machines.
narrative.core_loop: Run through high-speed side-scrolling acts, build momentum down slopes and through loops, collect rings for protection, defeat enemies with spin attacks, reach the act goal, and beat zone bosses to advance.

mechanics.map_notes: Sonic accelerates down slopes and maintains velocity; speed is core to level design and feel.
mechanics.expression: Sonic accelerates down slopes and maintains velocity; speed is core to level design and feel.

mechanics.map_notes: 360-degree loop-de-loops and curved geometry require sufficient speed to traverse.
mechanics.expression: 360-degree loop-de-loops and curved geometry require sufficient speed to traverse.

mechanics.map_notes: Jump spin and rolling state destroy enemies and are required for certain interactions.
mechanics.expression: Jump spin and rolling state destroy enemies and are required for certain interactions.

mechanics.map_notes: Rings act as a damage buffer; zero rings means the next hit is fatal.
mechanics.expression: Rings act as a damage buffer; zero rings means the next hit is fatal.

mechanics.map_notes: Spikes, crushers, underwater drowning timers, and bottomless pits.
mechanics.expression: Spikes, crushers, underwater drowning timers, and bottomless pits.

mechanics.map_notes: Lives counter decrements on death; continue when depleted.
mechanics.expression: Lives counter decrements on death; continue when depleted.

mechanics.map_notes: Rings scattered throughout acts; 100 rings grant an extra life.
mechanics.expression: Rings scattered throughout acts; 100 rings grant an extra life.

mechanics.map_notes: Lamppost checkpoints save position within multi-act zones.
mechanics.expression: Lamppost checkpoints save position within multi-act zones.

mechanics.map_notes: Zone bosses pilot machines with distinct attack phases and weak points.
mechanics.expression: Zone bosses pilot machines with distinct attack phases and weak points.

mechanics.map_notes: Secret paths, bonus stages, and Chaos Emerald special stages off main routes.
mechanics.expression: Secret paths, bonus stages, and Chaos Emerald special stages off main routes.

mechanics.map_notes: Robotnik machines follow predictable movement and attack cycles.
mechanics.expression: Robotnik machines follow predictable movement and attack cycles.

mechanics.map_notes: Crushers, flamethrowers, and boss wind-ups signal before activating.
mechanics.expression: Crushers, flamethrowers, and boss wind-ups signal before activating.

mechanics.map_notes: Each zone boss must be defeated to unlock the next zone.
mechanics.expression: Each zone boss must be defeated to unlock the next zone.

mechanics.map_notes: Variable jump height for platform sections that break momentum flow.
mechanics.expression: Variable jump height for platform sections that break momentum flow.

mechanics.map_notes: Chaos Emeralds require completing special stages accessed through giant rings.
mechanics.expression: Chaos Emeralds require completing special stages accessed through giant rings.

mechanics.map_notes: Springs, bumpers, and switches launch Sonic and alter stage routes.
mechanics.expression: Springs, bumpers, and switches launch Sonic and alter stage routes.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Sonic the Hedgehog through its core platformer loop.
